commands.name: fix-markdown-relative-urls
commands.description: Replace the relative urls in a markdown file with absolute urls using the provided RootUrl and RootFolder.  The new url will be the constructed with the format of: {RootUrl}/{PathRelativeToRootFolder}.  The utility is useful to fix the relative urls in the README.md file since the file is packed as part of the nuget package and its relative urls will not work in the nuget.org website

commands.name: version
commands.description: Create a prerelease version with the format of [version]-[commit_count].[branch]+[hash] or a release version with the format of [version]+[hash]

options.name: --directory
options.description: Specify the directory of the version file

options.name: --prod
options.description: If true, create a release version.  Otherwise create a prerelease version.

options.name: --directory-build-props
options.description: Use Directory.Build.props file instead of .version file

options.name: --prerelease-label
options.description: The label of the prerelease version, e.g. 'alpha', 'beta', 'rc'.  If not set, branch name would be used
